boldness_levels.name: Safe
boldness_levels.description: Friendly, easygoing, minimal risk of awkwardness.

boldness_levels.name: Confident
boldness_levels.description: Clear and direct without being over the top.

boldness_levels.name: Bold
boldness_levels.description: Playfully forward - stands out, still respectful.

boldness_levels.name: Edgy
boldness_levels.description: Sharper humor or teasing - higher risk, higher reward, best used once rapport exists.
